name: 17q21_31_inversion_polymorphism
description: 17q21.31 region with a common ~900 kb polymorphic inversion (H1 vs H2 haplotypes). H2 carriers are at risk for the Koolen-de Vries syndrome microdeletion (KANSL1 locus). Flanked by inverted SDs mediating both the inversion and recurrent CNVs.

architecture.internal_structure: Inverted SD pair of ~100-200 kb at >99% identity flanking the MAPT/KANSL1/CRHR1 interval; H1 and H2 haplotypes differ by a ~900 kb inversion plus duplication; H2 underrepresented in European populations historically.
